ModMetaData.name: Savecraft
ModMetaData.author: joshsymonds
ModMetaData.description: Your AI is making things up about your colony. Savecraft fixes that. This mod connects your colony to Claude and ChatGPT so they can see your actual game state — colonists, skills, mood, resources, research, defenses, and more. Real data, updated on every save. No more invented stats or wrong advice. What your AI sees Colony overview — wealth, storyteller, difficulty, date, colonist count Every colonist — backstory, traits, skills, mood, health, equipment Resources — full stockpile, food supply in nutrition-days, medicine Research — current project, completed list, available by tech level Mood report — break thresholds, risk levels, modifiers per colonist Health report — injuries, diseases, immunity, bleeding, pain Skills and work — priorities, passions, incapable-of flags Power grid — generators, batteries, consumption, surplus/deficit Farming — growing zones, crop progress, yield, soil fertility Defenses — turrets, traps, wall materials and counts Rooms — role, temperature, impressiveness, beauty, cleanliness Factions — relations, goodwill, hostile status Threats — wealth-based raid points, recent incidents Animals — species, bonded colonist, training, pregnancy Reference modules Your AI also gets computation tools that know RimWorld's actual formulas: Surgery calculator — success chance from skill, bed, medicine, lighting Crop optimizer — nutrition/day and silver/day per crop-soil combo Combat calculator — ranged and melee DPS, accuracy, armor penetration Material lookup — final stats for any item-material-quality combo Drug analyzer — production silver/day, addiction risk, safe intervals Raid estimator — expected raid points from wealth and colonist count Gene builder — xenogerm validation, complexity/metabolism budgets Research navigator — prerequisite chains, costs, speed estimates How it works 1. Subscribe to this mod and enable it 2. Start a game — the mod registers and shows a link code 3. Enter the code at savecraft.gg to connect your colony 4. Add the Savecraft MCP integration in Claude or ChatGPT 5. Ask about your colony — your AI sees your actual game state Data syncs on every save. No save files leave your machine — only parsed data. Compatibility RimWorld 1.5 and 1.6 All DLCs supported (Royalty, Ideology, Biotech, Anomaly) Safe to add or remove mid-save No Harmony conflicts — patches only GameDataSaveLoader.SaveGame Works alongside other mods (modded content not yet parsed) Privacy Savecraft sends structured game state to its server for your AI to read. No save files, no filesystem paths, no personal data. Open source: https://github.com/joshsymonds/savecraft.gg Links Website: https://savecraft.gg Source: https://github.com/joshsymonds/savecraft.gg Discord: https://discord.gg/savecraft
